summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form (eCRF) documenting a Cycle 4 Day 1 visit for patient BRC471-ES03-006 at site ES-03 in study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. The form captures vital signs, ECOG performance status, study drug dispensing details, concomitant medications, adverse events, PRO questionnaires, laboratory results, and investigator certification, with multiple documented corrections and protocol deviations.
